'''thathanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fease|fease]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-th-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fease|fease]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thathanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæthængæth|thæthængæth]] || [[word:thæthængæj|thæthængæj]] || [[word:thæthængæsh|thæthængæsh]] || [[word:thæthængæ|thæthængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathangath|thathathangath]] || [[word:thathathangaj|thathathangaj]] || [[word:thathathangash|thathathangash]] || [[word:thathathanga|thathathanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathangath|thathangath]] || [[word:thathangaj|thathangaj]] || [[word:thathangash|thathangash]] || [[word:thathanga|thathanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathafngath|thathafngath]] || [[word:thathafngaj|thathafngaj]] || [[word:thathafngash|thathafngash]] || [[word:thathafngaf|thathafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thathangatha|thathangatha]] || [[word:thathangaja|thathangaja]] || [[word:thathangasha|thathangasha]] || [[word:thathangaka|thathangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thathangath|thathangath]] || [[word:thathangaj|thathangaj]] || [[word:thathangash|thathangash]] || [[word:thathanga|thathanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thathangathal|thathangathal]] || [[word:thathangajal|thathangajal]] || [[word:thathangashal|thathangashal]] || [[word:thathangakal|thathangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thathangathatha|thathangathatha]] || [[word:thathangajaja|thathangajaja]] || [[word:thathangashasha|thathangashasha]] || [[word:thathangaka|thathangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thathangathan|thathangathan]] || [[word:thathangajan|thathangajan]] || [[word:thathangashan|thathangashan]] || [[word:thathangakan|thathangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thathangathaoro|thathangathaoro]] || [[word:thathangajaoro|thathangajaoro]] || [[word:thathangashaoro|thathangashaoro]] || [[word:thathangakaoro|thathangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
